package.name: wec_dyno_logger
package.description:
Performance metrics logger for the ROS2 WEC HIL Dynamometer.
Subscribes to PTO torque and joint state topics, computes standardised WEC performance metrics (average power, CWR, PAPR, tracking error, reactive power fraction) over a sliding window, publishes them in real time, and optionally exports to CSV for post-processing and publication.
References: Ringwood, J.V. et al. (2014). IEEE Control Systems, 34(5), 30–55. Penalba, M. et al. (2019). Renewable Energy, 139, 1077–1089.
